Clinic hours on the contact page are listed for the overall practice; specific parent-group session times require contacting the office or booking online.

document.name: Harlem Family Services — Parent Groups
document.description:
Harlem Family Services is a nonprofit community mental health clinic in East Harlem at The Margaret Morgan Lawrence Center for Family and Child Development (20 East 110th Street, Suite 201). Its official parent-groups page describes clinician-led gatherings for parents, guardians, and caregivers focused on child development, communication, discipline, emotional health, and building strong family relationships.

The page states that groups offer a safe space to share experiences, learn practical tools, and reduce isolation, and that both in-person and virtual options are available. Families are directed to call (212) 470-3162 or complete the online booking form on the official site to learn more or schedule a consultation. Published clinic hours on the contact page are Monday–Thursday 9:00 a.m.–8:00 p.m., Friday 8:00 a.m.–8:00 p.m., and Saturday 9:00 a.m.–5:00 p.m. (closed Sunday).

Sources: https://www.harlemfamilyservices.org/service/parent-groups https://www.harlemfamilyservices.org/ https://www.harlemfamilyservices.org/contact-us
